text:
Created attachment 234202
Update to 5.7.37-25.29

Passes portlint, poudriere on 12.3 and 13.1.

The patch contains a fix to Makefile CONFLICTS_INSTALL to avoid this port to conflict with itself.

Supersedes https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=262144
